sector.eyebrow_zh: 板块 · 标签解决方案
sector.subhead_en: One sentence shown under the sector H1.
sector.intro_en: One short paragraph shown above the application tabs. Keep it to the environment-challenge-to-material idea.
sector.intro_zh: 应用标签上方的一段简介

apps.purpose_en: What this label is used for (becomes the article lede).
apps.purpose_zh: 标签用途（作为文章导语）
apps.challenge_en: Environment challenge as a short phrase list — e.g. high heat, chemical exposure, moisture.
apps.challenge_zh: 面临的环境挑战，短语列表
apps.risk_en: What goes wrong if the wrong label is used.

products.benefit_en: What it achieves for this application.
products.spec_en: Key specs — temperature range, certifications, sizes.
products.spec_zh: 关键规格 —— 耐温范围、认证、尺寸
